name: G-Net Construction Dashboard — Multi-Type Job Tracker

parameters.jsCode:
// Parse new job creation payload
const raw = $input.item.json.body || $input.item.json;

return [{ json: {
  job_id: raw.job_id || 'JOB-' + Date.now(),
  job_site: raw.job_site || raw.jobSite || '',
  job_type: raw.job_type || 'unknown',
  client: raw.client || '',
  foreman: raw.foreman || '',
  contract_value: raw.contract_value || '',
  start_date: raw.start_date || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
  target_end_date: raw.target_end_date || '',
  permit_status: raw.permit_status || 'Pending',
  compliance_tags: raw.compliance_tags || [],
  reporting_cadence: raw.reporting_cadence || 'weekly',
  client_email: raw.client_email || '',
  created_at: new Date().toISOString()
}}];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ "model": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", "max_tokens": 600, "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "You are an AI operations assistant for G-Net Construction Corp., a multi-type NYC general contractor. Classify this foreman update and return ONLY valid JSON.

JOB SITE: " + $('Parse Foreman Update').item.json.job_site + "
FOREMAN NOTE: " + ($('Parse Foreman Update').item.json.foreman_note || 'No note') + "
BLOCKERS: " + ($('Parse Foreman Update').item.json.blockers || 'None') + "

Job types: hospital | school | tenant_improvement | flood_restoration | maintenance | commercial

Return JSON:
{
  "job_type": "one of the 6 types above",
  "status": "on_track" | "at_risk" | "blocked",
  "compliance_flags": ["array of compliance tags triggered this week"],
  "permit_alert": "yes" if DOB/DOH/DEP/FDNY action needed this period, else "no",
  "stalled_detection": "yes" if % hasn't moved >5pts vs prior update, else "no",
  "foreman_summary": "one sentence internal summary",
  "client_summary": "2-3 sentences plain English for property owner — no jargon",
  "next_milestone": "what happens next",
  "risk_factors": ["array of risk factors"],
  "report_cadence_override": "daily" | "weekly" | "bi-weekly" | "monthly" | "per_milestone" | "inherit"
}" }]) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ "model": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", "max_tokens": 500, "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Classify this new construction job and return ONLY valid JSON.

JOB SITE: " + $('Parse New Job Data').item.json.job_site + "
CLIENT: " + ($('Parse New Job Data').item.json.client || '') + "
PROJECT DESC: " + ($('Parse New Job Data').item.json.foreman_note || 'New project') + "

Return JSON:
{
  "job_type": "hospital" | "school" | "tenant_improvement" | "flood_restoration" | "maintenance" | "commercial",
  "compliance_tags": ["array of required compliance tags based on job type"],
  "permit_required": ["array of permit types likely needed"],
  "reporting_cadence": "daily" | "weekly" | "bi-weekly" | "monthly" | "per_milestone",
  "estimated_report_recipients": "who receives status updates",
  "vincent_alert": "yes" if hospital, school, or flood restoration (Vincent’s RA involvement needed), else "no"
}" }]) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Build row for Job Log Google Sheet
const d = $('Build Canonical Job Record').item.json;
return [{ json: {
  'Date': d.update_date || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
  'Job ID': d.job_id,
  'Job Site': d.job_site || '',
  'Job Type': d.job_type || '',
  'Foreman': d.foreman_name || '',
  'Percent Complete': String(d.percent_complete || 0),
  'Status': (d.status || '').toUpperCase(),
  'Status Emoji': d.status_emoji || '',
  'Foreman Summary': (d.foreman_summary || '').substring(0, 300),
  'Client Summary': (d.client_summary || '').substring(0, 300),
  'Blockers': d.blockers || 'None',
  'Compliance Flags': (d.compliance_flags || []).join(', '),
  'Permit Alert': d.permit_alert || 'no',
  'Stalled Detection': d.stalled_detection || 'no',
  'Next Milestone': (d.next_milestone || '').substring(0, 200),
  'Client Notified': 'Yes',
  'Owner Alert Sent': d.owner_alert_needed ? 'Yes' : 'No',
  'Photo URL': d.photo_url || ''
}}];

// Build new job row for Pipeline Google Sheet
const d = $('Build New Job Record').item.json;
return [{ json: {
  'Job ID': d.job_id,
  'Job Site': d.job_site,
  'Job Type': d.job_type,
  'Client': d.client,
  'Foreman': d.foreman,
  'Contract Value': d.contract_value,
  'Start Date': d.start_date,
  'Target End Date': d.target_end_date,
  'Permit Status': d.permit_status,
  'Permits Required': (d.permits_required || []).join(', '),
  'Compliance Tags': (d.compliance_tags || []).join(', '),
  'Reporting Cadence': d.reporting_cadence,
  'Client Email': d.client_email,
  'Vincent Alert': d.vincent_alert,
  'Current Status': 'on_track',
  'Percent Complete': '0',
  'Created': d.created_at
}}];

parameters.subject: ={{ 'New ' + $('Build New Job Record').item.json.job_type.replace('_', ' ') + ' job added to pipeline: ' + $('Build New Job Record').item.json.job_site }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

New Job Created

Job ID: ' + $('Build New Job Record').item.json.job_id + '

Site: ' + $('Build New Job Record').item.json.job_site + '

Type: ' + $('Build New Job Record').item.json.job_type.replace('_', ' ') + '

Client: ' + $('Build New Job Record').item.json.client + '

Compliance Tags: ' + ($('Build New Job Record').item.json.compliance_tags || []).join(', ') + '

Permits Required: ' + ($('Build New Job Record').item.json.permits_required || []).join(', ') + '

Foreman: ' + $('Build New Job Record').item.json.foreman + '

' }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Final webhook response — dashboard-ready JSON
const d = $('Build Canonical Job Record').item.json;
const alertSent = d.owner_alert_needed && $('Alert Needed?').item.json.output === undefined;

return [{ json: {
  success: true,
  job_id: d.job_id,
  job_site: d.job_site,
  job_type: d.job_type,
  percent_complete: d.percent_complete,
  status: d.status,
  status_emoji: d.status_emoji,
  stalled: d.stalled_detection === 'yes',
  permit_alert: d.permit_alert === 'yes',
  foreman_summary: d.foreman_summary,
  client_summary: d.client_summary,
  next_milestone: d.next_milestone,
  compliance_flags: d.compliance_flags,
  actions: [
    'AI classified as ' + (d.status || '').toUpperCase() + ' / ' + (d.job_type || '').toUpperCase(),
    'Logged to Job Log sheet',
    d.compliance_flags && d.compliance_flags.length > 0 ? 'Compliance flags logged' : 'No compliance flags this period',
    'Client report sent',
    d.owner_alert_needed ? 'VINCENT ALERTED — ' + (d.status === 'blocked' ? 'BLOCKED' : d.stalled_detection === 'yes' ? 'STALLED' : 'PERMIT ALERT') : 'No owner alert needed'
  ].filter(Boolean),
  processed_at: d.processed_at
}}];
